name: public-welfare-npc-batch-upgrade
title: Public-welfare NPC batch visual and role upgrade
description: Upgrade legacy default public-welfare NPCs in batches to reduce visual repetition, preserve style recipes, and keep every shop's multi-role chat experience fresh.
creator: lijin
notes: Follow-up task created from current session unresolved scope: audit and batch-upgrade legacy default public-welfare NPC visuals/roles, using image-style-prompt-extractor by default, preserving full style recipes, keeping every shop at 3+ chat-capable roles. Hospital trio is the new quality baseline and not proof that old NPCs are done.
